description: Häfele Minifix 15 die-cast eccentric-cam connector housing with optional seating rim, face drive, and side bolt-hook entry.
source: Häfele UK catalogue 14CFC294.pdf and 14CFC295.pdf, pp. 294--295; unlisted cage, C-hook, eccentric core, rib, drive-recess, and X-to-envelope geometry are proportion.
